name: V-dramon (Black)

signature_move.name: V-Breath Arrow
signature_move.description: Shoots an arrow of blue-white heat in the shape of a 'V'.

description: Sorry, but no official profile of V-dramon (Black) has been added yet. The following text is just the blurb of Bo-552 . This blue-black mythical dragon exhibits even greater ferocity! ⇨ English 獰猛さを増した、蒼黒の幻竜！
